summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BEG_Work construction management SaaS application. All backend APIs and frontend features are functioning correctly.

minor_issues.issue: POST returns 200 instead of 201 status code for user creation

authentication_flow.issue: Session seems to expire quickly when navigating between pages

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin@begwork.com/admin123 returns token and user data
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user without password_hash
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without token returns 403 (appropriate auth error)
Backend: GET /api/organization returns org details with valid token
Backend: PUT /api/organization updates org fields (Admin only)
Backend: GET /api/users returns user list without password hashes
Backend: POST /api/users creates new user (validates role, rejects duplicate email)
Backend: PUT /api/users/{user_id} updates user fields (Admin only)
Backend: DELETE /api/users/{user_id} deletes user (Admin only, cannot self-delete)
Backend: GET /api/feature-flags returns all 10 module flags
Backend: PUT /api/feature-flags toggles module (Admin only, M0 cannot be disabled)
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns audit entries with total count (Admin only)
Backend: GET /api/roles returns list of 8 roles
Backend: GET /api/subscription returns subscription info
Frontend: Login page loads with proper branding and form fields
Frontend: Login flow with admin credentials redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards (Total Users: 2, Active Modules: 2/10, Audit Events: 15, Plan: Enterprise)
Frontend: Dashboard displays recent activity with 8+ audit log entries
Frontend: Users page shows user table with 2 users, Add User dialog opens/closes
Frontend: Module Management page shows all 10 modules with proper status
Frontend: M0 Core module is properly locked and labeled
Frontend: Module toggles are functional (M1 enabled/disabled successfully)
Frontend: Company Settings page loads organization form and subscription info
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor auth session issue)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider fixing POST /api/users to return 201 status code instead of 200. Optional: Investigate auth session persistence for better UX between page navigation.
